arquivos_criados.descricao: ReactProfilerImpl - analyzes React components for performance issues
24 comprehensive test cases for React component profiling

profiler_features.component_scanning: ✅ Recursively finds all .tsx/.jsx component files (PascalCase or .component naming)
profiler_features.render_detection: ✅ Detects unnecessary re-renders via inline object/array creation
profiler_features.memo_detection: ✅ Identifies components that should use React.memo
profiler_features.usecallback_detection: ✅ Flags inline event handlers that could be memoized
profiler_features.dependency_array_analysis: ✅ Identifies large dependency arrays (>8 items) that need refactoring
profiler_features.severity_classification: ✅ Issues classified as HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW based on impact

performance_issues_detected.missing_memo: Components with props but no React.memo wrapper
performance_issues_detected.missing_usememo: Array operations (map, filter, reduce) without memoization
performance_issues_detected.inline_objects_arrays: Collections passed directly as JSX props

ast_analysis_capabilities.multi_pass_traversal: ✅ Separate passes for declaration collection and usage tracking
ast_analysis_capabilities.jsx_attribute_detection: ✅ Identifies inline objects/arrays in JSX attributes

test_coverage.summary_initialization: ✅ All issue types initialized with zero counts
test_coverage.issue_type_tracking: ✅ Tracks issues by type in summary
test_coverage.summary_validation: ✅ All issue types present in summary
test_coverage.impact_estimation: ✅ Issues include estimated impact when available

security_compliance.SEC-02: ✅ Path validation in component file discovery

integration_readiness.type_safety: ✅ Full TypeScript typing for result interface

performance_issue_examples.missing_memo: Component receives props but is not wrapped with React.memo → causes unnecessary child re-renders
performance_issue_examples.inline_handlers: onClick={handleClick} where handleClick is created inline → function reference changes every render
performance_issue_examples.inline_objects: onClick={() => setConfig({x: 1})} → new object created every render
performance_issue_examples.large_dependencies: useEffect(() => {...}, [a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i]) → 9 dependencies = excessive
performance_issue_examples.missing_memoization: list.map(item => <Item key={item.id} data={item}) → expensive computation every render

recommendations_examples.missing_memo: Wrap component with React.memo: export default React.memo(ComponentName);
recommendations_examples.missing_usecallback: Wrap handler in useCallback: const handler = useCallback(() => {...}, [deps]);
recommendations_examples.missing_usememo: Wrap computation in useMemo: const result = useMemo(() => expensiveComputation(), [deps]);
recommendations_examples.inline_collections: Move object/array outside or use useMemo for creation

next_steps.sprint_3: Real-time React profiling with DevTools integration

notes: ReactProfilerImpl complete with AST-based component performance analysis. 24/24 tests passing. Detects 6 categories of React performance anti-patterns including missing memoization, unnecessary re-renders, and large dependency arrays. Generates prioritized recommendations with estimated impact. Ready for integration into Arena Truco baseline capture in Sprint 3. Next: Task 2.2.8 (React integration tests) to complete Sprint 2.2.
